title: paepalanthus rectifolius
intro: Paepalanthus rectifolius, also known as the "rectifolius spike-rush," is a species of plant in the family Eriocaulaceae, characterized by its distinctive, upright habit and narrow leaves. Traditionally, Paepalanthus rectifolius has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and has been used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Paepalanthus rectifolius is often used as an infusion or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
